title: malleastrum orientale
intro: Malleastrum orientale is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. It is traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits associated with Malleastrum orientale include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Malleastrum orientale can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
